mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.ip, s.type, s.status, s.cpu_cores AS cpuCores, s.memory, s.cpu_usage AS cpuUsage, s.memory_usage AS memoryUsage, s.last_online AS lastOnline FROM server s
AND ( s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ( s.status = #{status} )
AND ( s.type = #{type} )
ORDER BY s.last_online DESC
